case_title: CHRISTOPHER WILLIAMS VS. DAVID CLAY JEWELERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID CLAY JEWELERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVID CLAY JEWELERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,527.70 PRINCIPAL, $11.96 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,764.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
